basic_details.job_title: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for Senior Project Associate and Project Assistant
basic_details.short_information: Bharathiar University is recruiting 3 research positions (1 Senior Project Associate + 2 Project Assistant) under the DRDO project for development of novel antidotes.

important_dates.interview_date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

application_fee.details: No application fee is mentioned. Candidates need to send only CV and supporting documents via email.

qualification.details: Candidates must fulfill the following as on the last date of application: | Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. degree in Bioinformatics / Computational Biology. Project Assistant: M.Sc. / M.Phil. in relevant disciplines (Bioinformatics/Computer Science or Biochemistry/Life Sciences). Desirable research experience in computational biology tools, molecular docking, modelling, or wet lab techniques. Good academic record and research aptitude.

selection_process: Screening of applications Shortlisting of candidates Personal Interview (only shortlisted candidates will be informed) Final selection based on interview performance and academic credentials
how_to_apply: Interested and eligible candidates should send their detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) along with self-attested copies of certificates through email to [email protected] on or before 24.07.2026.
Email Address: [email protected] Mobile: 99408 96562 Contact Person: Prof. N. Jeyakumar, Professor & Head, Department of Bioinformatics, Bharathiar University, Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu.
important_instructions: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment at Bharathiar University. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Notification
content_sections.text: Download DRDO-Antidotes Project Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Overview
content_sections.text: Bharathiar University is recruiting 3 research positions (1 Senior Project Associate + 2 Project Assistant) under the DRDO project for development of novel antidotes.

rows.bharathiar_university_coimbatore_departm: Development of Novel Antidote(s) For Highly Toxic Organophosphorous Compounds
Senior Project Associate: ₹42,000 + 20% HRA Project Assistant: ₹20,000 + 20% HRA
Initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years
Only for shortlisted candidates (No TA/DA admissible)

rows.date: To be informed to shortlisted candidates

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Vacancy Details
content_sections.text: 1. Senior Project Associate - 1 Post 2. Project Assistant - 2 Posts Note: Preference will be given to candidates with NET/SET/GATE qualifications.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Candidates must fulfill the following as on the last date of application: Senior Project Associate: Ph.D. degree in Bioinformatics / Computational Biology. Project Assistant: M.Sc. / M.Phil. in relevant disciplines (Bioinformatics/Computer Science or Biochemistry/Life Sciences). Desirable research experience in computational biology tools, molecular docking, modelling, or wet lab techniques. Good academic record and research aptitude.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Application Fee
content_sections.text: No application fee is mentioned. Candidates need to send only CV and supporting documents via email.

content_sections.heading: Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026 Selection Process
content_sections.text: Screening of applications Shortlisting of candidates Personal Interview (only shortlisted candidates will be informed) Final selection based on interview performance and academic credentials

content_sections.heading: How to Apply for Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Interested and eligible candidates should send their detailed Curriculum Vitae (CV) along with self-attested copies of certificates through email to [email protected] on or before 24.07.2026. Email Address: [email protected] Mobile: 99408 96562 Contact Person: Prof. N. Jeyakumar, Professor & Head, Department of Bioinformatics, Bharathiar University, Coimbatore - 641046, Tamil Nadu.

content_sections.heading: Important Instructions for Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Only shortlisted candidates will be called for interview. No TA/DA will be provided for attending the interview. The positions are purely temporary and co-terminus with the project. Selected candidates will have no claim for regular appointment at Bharathiar University. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification.

content_sections.heading: Who should Apply for Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026
content_sections.text: Candidates with strong background in Bioinformatics and Computational Biology. Ph.D. holders looking for research positions in antidotes development. M.Sc./M.Phil. graduates with NET/SET/GATE qualification and wet-lab/computational experience. Motivated researchers interested in DRDO-funded projects on organophosphorus compounds.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for DRDO Antidotes Project Bharathiar University Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to send the application via email is 24 July 2026.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available in DRDO-Antidotes Project Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: Total 3 posts: 1 Senior Project Associate and 2 Project Assistant positions.

faq.question: Q3. What is the fellowship amount for Senior Project Associate?
faq.answer: Selected candidate will receive ₹42,000 + 20% HRA per month.

faq.question: Q4. What is the eligibility for Project Assistant in DRDO Antidotes Project?
faq.answer: Candidates must have M.Sc./M.Phil. in Bioinformatics/Computer Science (1 post) or Biochemistry/Life Sciences (1 post). NET/SET/GATE qualified candidates get preference.

faq.question: Q5. How to apply for Bharathiar University DRDO Project 2026?
faq.answer: Send detailed CV with certificate copies to [email protected] before 24.07.2026.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for DRDO Antidotes Project Recruitment?
faq.answer: No application fee is required.

faq.question: Q7. What is the tenure of the selected candidates?
faq.answer: Initially 1 year, extendable up to 3 years based on performance and project requirement.

faq.question: Q8. Is Ph.D. mandatory for Senior Project Associate post?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates must have a Ph.D. in Bioinformatics or Computational Biology.

faq.question: Q9. Will selected candidates get any permanent position?
faq.answer: No. These are purely temporary project positions co-terminus with the project duration.

faq.question: Q10. Where is the venue for the interview of DRDO Antidotes Project Bharathiar University?
faq.answer: The interview will be conducted at the Department of Bioinformatics, Bharathiar University, Coimbatore. Exact date and time will be informed to shortlisted candidates only.
